name: LevelUp Pickleball Club
about: LevelUp Pickleball Club is a state-of-the-art multi-sport facility located in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania, featuring 16 indoor courts and a premium golf simulator. The venue offers a unique combination of pickleball play, professional coaching, social events, and full bar/restaurant services. It is equipped with advanced technology including Category 1 broadcast-quality lighting and a 7-layer US Open cushioned surface, providing a premium experience for athletes and socializers alike. The facility hosts private events, leagues, and tournaments, making it a versatile space for both casual play and organized competitions.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulator used by professionals like Tiger, Spieth, and Rahm
Ability to take lessons or play on 200+ world-renowned courses
Integrated with a full bar and restaurant for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar and restaurant available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Same simulator used by Tiger, Spieth, Rahm and more

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full bar and restaurant on-site for food and drink purchases.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take around 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and hosts events suitable for all ages.
